messages.content: Natural ingredients are cosmetic ingredients obtained only from plants, animals, micro-organisms orminerals, including those obtained from these materials by 翻译成中文
天然成分是仅从植物、动物、微生物或矿物质中获取的化妆品成分，包括从这些材料中通过提取而获得的成分。

physical processes (e.g. grinding, drying, distillation),fermentation reactions occurring in nature and leading to molecules which occur in nature, and other procedures of preparation including traditional ones (e.g. extraction using solvents) without intentional chemical modification (Annex A includes the definition of solvents and the categories of extracts using solvents for ingredient processing and manufacturing). The following materials, and materials originating from them, shall be considered to fall under the general heading of natural origin:a) plants including fungi and algae;NOTE 1 Ingredients coming from genetically modified plants can be considered as natural ingredients in certain regions of the world. NOTE 2 In the context of these guidelines, the term "herb" can be used as a synonym for the word plant.

自然成分是通过物理过程（如研磨、干燥、蒸馏）、自然发生的发酵反应导致的分子以及其他制备过程（包括传统的提取使用溶剂）而获得的化妆品成分，而没有故意进行化学修改（附件A包括溶剂的定义和使用溶剂进行成分处理和制造的提取分类）。以下材料及其来源材料应被视为自然来源的总概念：a）植物，包括真菌和藻类；注1：来自基因修改植物的成分在世界某些地区可以被视为自然成分。注2：在这些指南的背景下，“草药”一词可用作“植物”的同义词。
fermentation reactions occurring in nature and leading to molecules which occur in nature, and
自然界中发生的发酵反应会导致形成自然界中存在的分子。

other procedures of preparation including traditional ones (e.g. extraction using solvents) without intentional chemical modification (Annex A includes the definition of solvents and the categories of extracts using solvents for ingredient processing and manufacturing).
其他制备过程包括传统的一些方式（例如使用溶剂进行提取），这些过程不会故意进行化学修改（附件A包括溶剂的定义和使用溶剂进行成分处理和制造的提取分类）。
感谢您的确认！如果您还有其他问题或需要帮助，请随时提出。
The following materials, and materials originating from them, shall be considered to fall under the general heading of natural origin
以下材料及其来源材料应被视为自然来源的总概念：
The term "organic farming" can be defined as per individual national jurisdiction where applicable.
“有机农业”这个术语的定义可以根据个别国家的法律管辖范围进行界定，并遵循该国的相关规定。

Derived natural ingredients are cosmetic ingredients of greater than 50 % natural origin, by molecular weight, by renewable carbon content, or by any other relevant methods, obtained through defined chemical and/or biological processes with the intention of chemical modification.
衍生自然成分是指在化学和/或生物学过程中以化学修改为目的，通过定义的化学和/或生物学过程获得的，按照分子量、可再生碳含量或其他相关方法超过50％的天然来源化妆品成分。
resulting in certain cases of ingredients of wholly natural origin.
在某些情况下，衍生自然成分的处理会导致成分完全由天然材料制成。
